policy_evidence.robots: robots policy evidence fixture reviewed for public PP&D metadata-only refresh planning
policy_evidence.policy: targets are PP&D public allowlisted source fixtures

rate_limit.window: one metadata review candidate per host every ten seconds before any future live execution

reviewer_checkpoints: review affected source ids before accepting proposed cadence changes
review robots and allowlist evidence before any future live recrawl plan
review no mutation attestations before schedule promotion

abort_escalation.abort: abort if the schedule candidate requires live fetch, processor invocation, registry mutation, or schedule mutation
abort_escalation.escalation: escalate to the PP&D source freshness reviewer before promotion
